rules.name: Multi-Agent Orchestration Standards
rules.description: Always follow AILCC agent naming protocol and handoff conventions
enforcements: Use Intent Router for task classification
Route through Comet Assist for verification
Log all agent interactions to Memory Manager

rules.name: Code Generation Standards
rules.description: TypeScript-first with strict mode, Jest tests required
enforcements: All new code must have Jest tests

rules.name: Agent Adapter Protocol
rules.description: All adapters must implement standardized interface
enforcements: Support both real and mock modes

rules.name: Documentation Sync
rules.description: Keep architecture docs updated with code changes
enforcements: Sync with COMET_ASSIST_MANIFEST.md if affecting workflows

rules.name: Cost Management
rules.description: Monitor and optimize API costs across all agents
enforcements: Check daily cost thresholds: warning=$50, alert=$100, cutoff=$200
Use token-efficient agents for simple tasks
Route to mock adapters in development
Log all costs to CostTracker interface
